title: Twanda Sweet
compiled_truth: Twanda Sweet is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-03-29), Twanda Sweet sent 393 and received 982 emails, totalling 1375 interactions. Top correspondents: [Mark Haedicke](people/mark-haedicke) (97), [Julia Murray](people/julia-murray) (46), [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (41), [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (37), [Jeffrey Hodge](people/jeffrey-hodge) (33).
